source_pr.title: planner/core: fix a bug during add cast for decimal join key
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close https://github.com/pingcap/tics/issues/1704

Problem Summary:

The cause of this bug is that after [pr convert decimal type join key](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/23191) is merged, we will change the decimal join key with a well-casted one. But when we construct the physical, the join keys is shallow copied. Changing join keys will change the keys on other hash join candidates and results in this bug. 

### What is changed and how it works?

What's Changed:
deep copy the join equal expressions when planner replace the join key with the cast function.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test


### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- planner/core: fix a bug during add cast for decimal join key

symptoms: tk.MustQuery("select /*+ nth_plan(2) */ t1.c1 from t t1 join t t2 on t1.c1 = t2.c3 order by t1.c1").Check(testkit.Rows("1.00000", "1.00000", "1.00010")) (executor/tiflash_test.go)
failure_signature: tk.MustQuery("select /*+ nth_plan(2) */ t1.c1 from t t1 join t t2 on t1.c1 = t2.c3 order by t1.c1").Check(testkit.Rows("1.00000", "1.00000", "1.00010")) (executor/tiflash_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it asserted an exact plan/EXPLAIN output that can vary between runs. Exact plan/EXPLAIN assertions are brittle when optimizer choices can vary. This PR stabilizes it by: tk.MustQuery("select /*+ nth_plan(2) */ t1.c1 from t t1 join t t2 on t1.c1 = t2.c3 order by t1.c1").Check(testkit.Rows("1.00000", "1.00000", "1.00010")) (executor/tiflash_test.go).
fix_pattern: tk.MustQuery("select /*+ nth_plan(2) */ t1.c1 from t t1 join t t2 on t1.c1 = t2.c3 order by t1.c1").Check(testkit.Rows("1.00000", "1.00000", "1.00010")) (executor/tiflash_test.go)

evidence: evidence: tk.MustQuery("select /*+ nth_plan(2) */ t1.c1 from t t1 join t t2 on t1.c1 = t2.c3 order by t1.c1").Check(testkit.Rows("1.00000", "1.00000", "1.00010")) (executor/tiflash_test.go)
